title: Classic Improvements Fixes
description: A small hub that host some fixes for Classic Improvements and its Add-ons
body:
# Classic Improvements Fixes 

### What is this for!?

This for my resource packs Classic Improvements and its add-ons this is a hub for fixes that cant be added to the pack due to problems with older versions or compatibility errors

So far there's only 3. One for a add-on and two for the base pack they are!

Logo fix [CIMS/ BASE PACK]

Shader leaves [CIMS/ BASE PACK]

Text fix [ADD ON 1]

There are no mods needed so far 

**Quick note the order is**

#### TOP - LOGO/ SHADER LEAVES

####  BELOW CIMS - TEXT FIX

## DOWNLOADS

[Classic Improvements](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classicimprovements)

[Classic Improvements ADD ON 1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-improvements-(add-on-1))
